description: Targeted micro-location research for high-quality ice cream spots across multiple Northeast states. Heavy focus on recent X posts for authentic photos and product details.

targets.name: Portland-ME
targets.location: Portland, South Portland, and immediate coastal areas, Maine

targets.name: Kennebunk-York
targets.location: Kennebunkport, York, and southern Maine coast, Maine

targets.name: Portsmouth-NH
targets.location: Portsmouth, Rye, and Seacoast New Hampshire

targets.name: Manchester-NH
targets.location: Manchester, Concord area, and southern New Hampshire

targets.name: Burlington-VT-2
targets.location: Burlington, Shelburne, Stowe corridor, Vermont (deeper than wave 1)

targets.name: Stowe-Smugglers
targets.location: Stowe, Waterbury, and Smugglers Notch area, Vermont

targets.name: Boston-Cambridge-2
targets.location: Boston, Cambridge, Somerville, and inner suburbs, Massachusetts (deeper dive)

targets.name: North-Shore-MA
targets.location: Salem, Gloucester, Rockport, and Cape Ann, Massachusetts

targets.name: South-Shore-MA
targets.location: Plymouth, Duxbury, and South Shore, Massachusetts

targets.name: Pioneer-Valley-MA
targets.location: Northampton, Amherst, Easthampton, Pioneer Valley, Massachusetts

targets.name: Providence-RI
targets.location: Providence, Pawtucket, and immediate Rhode Island

targets.name: Newport-RI
targets.location: Newport and Aquidneck Island, Rhode Island

targets.name: Hartford-CT
targets.location: Hartford, West Hartford, and central Connecticut

targets.name: New-Haven-CT
targets.location: New Haven, Guilford, and shoreline Connecticut

targets.name: Hudson-Valley-NY
targets.location: Hudson, Rhinebeck, Beacon, and mid-Hudson Valley, New York

targets.name: Catskills-NY
targets.location: Woodstock, Phoenicia, and northern Catskills, New York

targets.name: Long-Island-NY
targets.location: North Fork and South Fork of Long Island, New York

notes: Run in waves of 6-8 parallel calls. Prioritize X post photos and product close-ups. Gate all output through coordinate validator.
